title: HPV vaccine counseling
specialty: Preventive care / screening / counseling / administrative documentation

investigations.text: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.
investigations.rationale: Supports HPV prevention and clinician-delivered counselling context for HPV prevention counselling; no decision is generated.
investigations.evidence_extract: Supports documenting an entered HPV result, the limitations of source attribution and timing, partner discussion and screening-programme context; it does not diagnose cancer or identify the source of infection.

source_limitations: All item-level mappings remain unsupported pending separate clinician review and signed approval.
Age, sex, vaccine history, eligibility, contraindications, counselling content, decision, product, dose, administration and follow-up remain absent.
No diagnosis, interpretation, investigation, treatment, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, escalation or disposition is generated for HPV prevention counselling.
Any legacy item not explicitly mapped to an exact section remains unsupported pending qualified clinician review.
No mapping authorises an automatic diagnosis, differential, investigation, management decision, medicine, dose, procedure, referral, urgency conclusion, discharge decision, or patient instruction.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
